sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 6.31 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.6)

statement.latex: b) Let$G$be a finitely generated residually finite group,$d(G)$the minimal number of its generators, and$(G)$the minimal number of topological generators of the profinite completion of$G$. It is known that there exist groups$G$for which$d(G) > (G)$(G.\,A.\,Noskov, Math. Notes, 33, no.\,4 (1983), 249--254). Is the function$d$bounded on the set of groups$G$with the fixed value of$(G) 2$?

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory IV_PROBLEM_UNDEFINED; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
